title: The Dan expansion
description: A Minecraft expansion with way too many things (currently in beta)
body:
Made by Dan

have you ever wanted a mod that adds alot of new things? 
Well this is the mod for you!

Wonder what this mod adds? Well ill tell you!

Multiple new weapons and armour.

MORE DIMENSIONS!

Some new enemies and bosses.

A entire butter set.

Hard recipes.

New drops from enemies.

And much much more.

(i made this for fun)
